sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12970" key="a)pokta/men" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποκτάμεν</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-κτάμεναι</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-κτάμενος</orth>, <sense id="n12970.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀποκτείνω.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
